recipe.title: Healthy Pet Recipe
recipe.description: Safe, veterinarian-formulated recipes for various species of domestic pets

tipoAnimal.description: Species classification of the pet (Cachorro, Gato, Pássaro, Coelho, Hamster, Peixe)

titulo.description: Descriptive and engaging title of the recipe

descricao.description: Short summary or description of the diet dish

ingredientes.description: List of precise safe ingredients for the recipe

modoPreparo.description: Detailed step-by-step instructions text of how to prepare the recipe

beneficios.description: Crucial health or medical advantage of this diet composition

geradaPorIA.description: True if generated using Gemini AI, false if pre-seeded

/recipes/{recipeId}.description: Durable Firestore collection representing individual healthy recipes
